achievements.title: Journey Has Started!
achievements.description: Your Pokemon adventure has just begun. Have fun!
achievements.author: jos

achievements.title: Triple Trouble!
achievements.description: Earn the Trio Badge.
achievements.author: jos

achievements.title: An Archeologist With Backbone
achievements.description: Earn the Basic Badge.
achievements.author: jos

achievements.title: Premier Insect Artist
achievements.description: Earn the Insect Badge.
achievements.author: jos

achievements.title: The Shining Beauty
achievements.description: Earn the Bolt Badge.
achievements.author: jos

achievements.title: The Underground Boss
achievements.description: Earn the Quake Badge.
achievements.author: jos

achievements.title: The High-Flying Girl
achievements.description: Earn the Jet Badge.
achievements.author: jos

achievements.title: Ice Mask
achievements.description: Earn the Freeze Badge.
achievements.author: jos

achievements.title: The Girl Who Knows the Hearts of Dragons
achievements.description: Earn the Legend Badge.
achievements.author: jos

achievements.title: Truth and Ideals
achievements.description: Beat the game.
achievements.author: jos

achievements.title: My Code Name, It Is Looker
achievements.description: Help Looker to find the remaining Six Sages all over Unova.
achievements.author: jos

achievements.title: Oracle of Seasons
achievements.description: Show the scientist in the Season Research Lab all the forms of Deerling and obtain a reward.
achievements.author: jos

achievements.title: Learning to Be Better and Better
achievements.description: Defeat Cheren's strongest team.
achievements.author: jos

achievements.title: Pokemon Professor Helper
achievements.description: Defeat Bianca's strongest team.
achievements.author: jos

achievements.title: Heated Battle
achievements.description: Defeat Cynthia in Undella Town.
achievements.author: jos

achievements.title: Spring Has Sprung
achievements.description: Defeat Cynthia in a rematch.
achievements.author: jos

achievements.title: The Legendary Trainer
achievements.description: Defeat GAME FREAK Morimoto.
achievements.author: jos

achievements.title: Certified Trainer
achievements.description: Score enough to get Master Rank in the Battle Institute (Single).
achievements.author: jos

achievements.title: Certified Double Trainer
achievements.description: Score enough to get Master Rank in the Battle Institute (Double).
achievements.author: jos

achievements.title: You Are a Super Player
achievements.description: Earn the right to challenge the Super Single, Super Double and Super Multi Trains.
achievements.author: jos

achievements.title: Prepare for Trouble!
achievements.description: Defeat Subway Boss Ingo in a Super Single Train battle.
achievements.author: jos

achievements.title: Make It Double!
achievements.description: Defeat Subway Boss Emmet in a Super Double Train battle.
achievements.author: jos

achievements.title: Art of Fighting
achievements.description: Defeat the trainers in the Battle House in one session without leaving the area having only White Forest pokemon. (Lv39 max)
achievements.author: jos

achievements.title: Worthy of the Champion Title
achievements.description: In a single session, rematch the Pokémon League in Set Mode with Pokémon at level 75 or below after the first Elite 4 member battle, without using items during battle, and without using Legendaries restricted by the Battle Subway ruleset
achievements.author: jos

achievements.title: Foreign Challenger
achievements.description: Enter in the Hall of Fame with a party of pokemon not originally native to Unova.
achievements.author: jos

achievements.title: Well Worth the Wait
achievements.description: Purchase a delicious Casteliacone.
achievements.author: jos

achievements.title: Collectathon
achievements.description: Obtain all the type boosting items scattered across Unova (plates and incenses don't count).
achievements.author: jos

achievements.title: Colourful Plates
achievements.description: Obtain all the ancient plates.
achievements.author: jos

achievements.title: Ancient Ruins Researcher
achievements.description: Obtain a Relic Crown.
achievements.author: jos

achievements.title: The Biggest Pokefan
achievements.description: Obtain all the rewards from the chairman of the Fan Club in Icirrus City.
achievements.author: jos

achievements.title: Impressive Movepool
achievements.description: Obtain all the TMs and HMs.
achievements.author: jos

achievements.title: Show Me Your Moves
achievements.description: Teach a move to one of your pokemon via a Move Tutor.
achievements.author: jos

achievements.title: Fashionista
achievements.description: Win a musical for the first time.
achievements.author: jos

achievements.title: Fashion Enthusiast
achievements.description: Obtain all the obtainable Props for the musical.
achievements.author: jos

achievements.title: Master of the Elements
achievements.description: Obtain one of the three elemental monkeys as a gift.
achievements.author: jos

achievements.title: Deal!
achievements.description: Buy an extremely rare Pokemon.
achievements.author: jos

achievements.title: Odd Gift
achievements.description: Obtain a special egg.
achievements.author: jos

achievements.title: Conqueror of the Opposite World
achievements.description: Trade a Petilil and a Minccino for rare Pokemon in Nacrene and Driftveil City.
achievements.author: jos

achievements.title: It's Something
achievements.description: Trade a Boldore for Emolga on Route 7.
achievements.author: jos

achievements.title: Trading.exe Has Stopped Working
achievements.description: Trade a Ditto for Rotom on Route 15.
achievements.author: jos

achievements.title: Summer Voracity
achievements.description: Trade a Cinccino for Munchlax in Undella Town.
achievements.author: jos

achievements.title: Living Statue
achievements.description: Catch a Zen Mode Darmanitan.
achievements.author: jos

achievements.title: Good Night Here
achievements.description: Catch a Telepathy Musharna.
achievements.author: jos

achievements.title: The Sun
achievements.description: Catch a Volcarona in Relic Castle.
achievements.author: jos

achievements.title: Victory Star
achievements.description: Catch Victini.
achievements.author: jos

achievements.title: The Goat of Justice
achievements.description: Catch Cobalion.
achievements.author: jos

achievements.title: The Antelope of Justice
achievements.description: Catch Virizion.
achievements.author: jos

achievements.title: The Bull of Justice
achievements.description: Catch Terrakion.
achievements.author: jos

achievements.title: The Deep Black Pokemon
achievements.description: Catch Zekrom.
achievements.author: jos

achievements.title: The Bolt Striker
achievements.description: Catch Thundurus.
achievements.author: jos

achievements.title: The Ultimate of Nothingness
achievements.description: Catch Kyurem.
achievements.author: jos

achievements.title: My Personal Safari
achievements.description: Catch 4 different Pokemon in the White Forest.
achievements.author: jos

achievements.title: Gotta Catch em' All - White (Regional)
achievements.description: Catch all 130 possible Regional Dex Pokemon without using external devices.
achievements.author: jos

achievements.title: Gotta Catch em' All - White (National)
achievements.description: Catch all 202 possible National Dex Pokemon without using external devices. (Does not include Unova)
achievements.author: jos

achievements.title: Awaken, My Masters!
achievements.description: Awaken all the Zen Mode Darmanitan that sleep in the Desert Resort.
achievements.author: jos

achievements.title: Live Concert
achievements.description: Listen to the 2 performances in Accumula Town for a minute.
achievements.author: jos

achievements.title: Otherworldly Explorer
achievements.description: Explore the Entralink (and Entree Forest) as much as possible.
achievements.author: jos

achievements.title: Official Doxxing Award
achievements.description: Register your location in the Geonet.
achievements.author: jos

achievements.title: Professional Respondent
achievements.description: Answer all the questionnaires in the Passerby Analytics HQ.
achievements.author: jos

achievements.title: Super Secret Machine
achievements.description: Unlock the Relocator.
achievements.author: jos

achievements.title: Renaissance Trainer
achievements.description: Obtain an Antidote for answering the question correctly in Icirrus City.
achievements.author: jos

achievements.title: Outstanding Work
achievements.description: Serve the correct sandwiches and earn a Lum Berry in Village Bridge.
achievements.author: jos

achievements.title: Catch of the Day
achievements.description: Show the requested pokemon to a fisherman in Village Bridge.
achievements.author: jos

achievements.title: Street Band
achievements.description: Stay for a minute in Village Bridge listening to all the sound additions.
achievements.author: jos

achievements.title: Did I Just See... What?
achievements.description: Find a ghost on a bridge.
achievements.author: jos

achievements.title: Eagle Eye
achievements.description: Obtain a Big Mushroom on the Marvelous Bridge.
achievements.author: jos

achievements.title: Lucky Drink
achievements.description: Get an extra drink for free from a vending machine.
achievements.author: jos

achievements.title: This Tune Sounds Familiar
achievements.description: Listen to a dramatic sound in Castelia City.
achievements.author: jos

achievements.title: What Kind of Pokemon Battle Is This?
achievements.description: Get on time to the Stadium or Court stands in Nimbasa City while there is an on-going game.
achievements.author: jos

achievements.title: Cleanliness 2: Electric Boogaloo
achievements.description: Fully clean all your badges.
achievements.author: jos

achievements.title: Great Views!
achievements.description: Admire Route 14 for a minute on the rare occasions where the mist disappears.
achievements.author: jos

achievements.title: Happy New Year!
achievements.description: Stay for a minute in Icirrus City enjoying the diamond dust.
achievements.author: jos

achievements.title: Press F to Pay Respects
achievements.description: Hold a moment of silence in honor of the fallen pokemon by closing the lid of the DS atop the Celestial Tower.
achievements.author: jos
